opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My jaw is completely locked shut, the pain is shooting up into my temples, and my whole body aches from the stress.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My jaw seized up over the last half day — I can barely open my mouth to eat or drink and the pain shoots into my temples; I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the last 12 hours after heavy grinding
symptom_narrative.character: locked jaw (trismus), tight rock-hard jaw muscles, pain into temples and neck
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't open my mouth or chew; frightened it's stuck
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both jaw muscles/TMJ, temples and neck
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a TMD flare with my fibromyalgia central sensitisation
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: whole-body ache; struggling to drink because opening hurts
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have fibromyalgia and jaw problems (bruxism), but not this locked

past_medical_history.how_managed: pacing, heat, night guard on and off

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: maximum, no relief of the spasm

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and can barely drink because opening my mouth hurts

communication_style.typical_message_style: speaking through clenched teeth, anxious about the locked jaw

objective_data_offered.value: my jaw muscles feel rock hard; I can only open my mouth a little; no swelling under my chin/neck and my breathing is fine
no vision changes and my temples aren't tender to touch
